name: zero_guard_start
description: Initial zeros to make payload start/order obvious.

name: small_signed_constants
description: Small values around zero, repeated to expose rounding/sign behavior.

name: edge_constants
description: Signed 16-bit edges and likely quantizer boundaries.

name: full_signed_16_ramp
description: Every possible signed 16-bit PCM value exactly once.

name: left_justified_12bit_codes
description: All 4096 possible signed 12-bit values represented as left-justified 16-bit PCM.

name: byte_pattern_probe
description: Repeated bit-pattern values to help identify byte/nibble order.

name: alternating_extremes
description: Alternating extremes to expose pair packing order.

name: zero_guard_end
description: Trailing zeros to make end alignment obvious.
